sentences.english: I walk my dog every evening after dinner.
sentences.korean: 매일 저녁 식사 후에 개를 산책시켜요.

sentences.english: Her name is Coco and she is a small white poodle.
She gets very excited when she sees me pick up her leash.
sentences.korean: 내가 목줄을 드는 걸 보면 매우 흥분해요.

sentences.english: We usually walk around the park near our apartment for about thirty minutes.
sentences.korean: 보통 아파트 근처 공원을 약 30분 동안 산책해요.

sentences.english: Walking Coco is the best part of my day because it relaxes me after studying.
sentences.korean: 코코를 산책시키는 건 하루 중 가장 좋은 시간이에요. 공부 후에 편안하게 해주니까요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
